news.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-4.5 with Enhanced Reasoning
news.titleZh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5，推理能力大幅提升
news.summary: OpenAI announces GPT-4.5, featuring significant improvements in mathematical reasoning and code generation. The model shows 40% better performance on complex problem-solving tasks.
news.summaryZh: OpenAI 发布 GPT-4.5，在数学推理和代码生成方面有显著提升。该模型在复杂问题解决任务上表现提高了40%。
news.content:
OpenAI has officially released GPT-4.5, the latest iteration in their flagship language model series. This version introduces several key improvements:

1. Enhanced Mathematical Reasoning: GPT-4.5 demonstrates superior performance on advanced mathematics problems, including calculus and abstract algebra.

2. Code Generation: The model now generates more efficient and bug-free code, with particular strength in Python and JavaScript.

3. Context Understanding: Improved ability to maintain context over longer conversations, with support for up to 128k tokens.

4. Multilingual Support: Better performance across non-English languages, particularly Chinese, Japanese, and German.

The model is available through OpenAI's API and ChatGPT Plus subscription.

news.title: Google DeepMind's AlphaFold 3 Predicts All Biomolecules
news.titleZh: Google DeepMind AlphaFold 3 可预测所有生物分子
news.summary: AlphaFold 3 expands beyond proteins to predict DNA, RNA, and small molecule structures with unprecedented accuracy, revolutionizing drug discovery.
news.summaryZh: AlphaFold 3 超越蛋白质预测，可以高精度预测 DNA、RNA 和小分子结构，彻底改变药物发现领域。
news.content:
Google DeepMind has released AlphaFold 3, a groundbreaking expansion of their protein structure prediction system. The new version can predict the structure of virtually all biomolecules:

Key Capabilities:
- Protein-DNA interactions
- RNA folding patterns
- Small molecule binding sites
- Complex molecular assemblies

Impact on Drug Discovery:
Pharmaceutical companies are already using AlphaFold 3 to identify new drug targets and predict drug-protein interactions, potentially reducing drug development time by years.

news.title: Tesla Unveils FSD V13 with End-to-End Neural Networks
news.titleZh: 特斯拉发布 FSD V13，采用端到端神经网络
news.summary: Tesla's Full Self-Driving V13 replaces traditional computer vision with a single end-to-end neural network, reducing interventions by 60%.
news.summaryZh: 特斯拉 FSD V13 用单一端到端神经网络取代传统计算机视觉，干预次数减少60%。
news.content:
Tesla has released Full Self-Driving (FSD) Version 13, marking a major architectural shift in autonomous driving technology.

Key Changes:
- Single end-to-end neural network replaces 300,000 lines of C++ code
- Direct video input to steering output
- 60% reduction in human interventions
- Improved handling of complex urban scenarios

The update is rolling out to FSD Beta users in North America this week.

news.title: Boston Dynamics' Atlas Can Now Do Construction Work
news.titleZh: 波士顿动力 Atlas 机器人现已能从事建筑工作
news.summary: The latest Atlas demonstration shows the humanoid robot performing construction tasks including drywall installation and tool handling.
news.summaryZh: 最新的 Atlas 演示显示，这款人形机器人可以执行建筑任务，包括安装干墙和操作工具。
news.content:
Boston Dynamics has showcased a new version of their Atlas humanoid robot capable of performing construction tasks autonomously.

Demonstrated Capabilities:
- Drywall installation
- Tool manipulation (drills, hammers)
- Material transport
- Working alongside human construction workers

Commercial Deployment:
Boston Dynamics plans to begin pilot programs with construction companies in Q3 2026.

news.title: OpenClaw 2.0 Released with Multi-Agent Orchestration
news.titleZh: OpenClaw 2.0 发布，支持多智能体编排
news.summary: OpenClaw 2.0 introduces agent teams, shared memory, and a skill marketplace. Users can now create workflows with multiple AI agents working together.
news.summaryZh: OpenClaw 2.0 引入智能体团队、共享内存和技能市场。用户现在可以创建多个 AI 智能体协作的工作流。
news.content:
OpenClaw 2.0 is now available, bringing powerful new capabilities for building AI agent applications:

New Features:
- Agent Teams: Coordinate multiple agents to work on complex tasks
- Shared Memory: Agents can share context and learn from each other
- Skill Marketplace: Discover and install pre-built agent skills
- Enhanced Security: Enterprise-grade access controls

The update is available immediately for all users.

news.title: Sora Public Release: OpenAI's Video Generation Model
news.titleZh: Sora 公开发布：OpenAI 视频生成模型
news.summary: Sora is now available to ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, capable of generating 60-second 1080p videos from text prompts.
news.summaryZh: Sora 现已向 ChatGPT Plus 和 Pro 用户开放，可根据文本提示生成60秒1080p视频。
news.content:
OpenAI has officially released Sora, their text-to-video generation model, to the public.

Capabilities:
- Generate 60-second 1080p videos
- Text-to-video and image-to-video
- Video editing and extension
- Support for various aspect ratios

Availability:
Sora is included with ChatGPT Plus ($20/month) and Pro subscriptions. Free tier users get limited generations.

news.title: Mistral AI Releases Large 2.5 with 128K Context
news.titleZh: Mistral AI 发布 Large 2.5，支持 128K 上下文
news.summary: Mistral Large 2.5 offers competitive performance with GPT-4 at a fraction of the cost, featuring 128K token context window.
news.summaryZh: Mistral Large 2.5 以更低成本提供与 GPT-4 相当的性能，支持 128K token 上下文窗口。
news.content:
Mistral AI has announced Large 2.5, their most capable language model to date.

Key Features:
- 128K context window
- Multilingual support (80+ languages)
- Coding and reasoning capabilities
- 50% lower cost than GPT-4 Turbo

The model is available through Mistral's API and on Azure AI Studio.

news.title: Figure AI's Humanoid Robot Joins BMW Factory
news.titleZh: Figure AI 人形机器人加入宝马工厂
news.summary: Figure 01 humanoid robots begin trial deployment at BMW's Spartanburg plant for manufacturing assistance.
news.summaryZh: Figure 01 人形机器人在宝马斯巴达堡工厂开始试部署，协助制造工作。
news.content:
Figure AI has begun deploying their humanoid robots at BMW's manufacturing facility in Spartanburg, South Carolina.

Deployment Details:
- Initial trial with 10 Figure 01 robots
- Tasks include parts handling and quality inspection
- 24/7 operation capability
- Integration with existing factory systems

If successful, BMW plans to expand deployment to additional facilities.

news.title: Waymo Expands Robotaxi Service to Los Angeles
news.titleZh: Waymo 将机器人出租车服务扩展至洛杉矶
news.summary: Waymo's autonomous robotaxi service is now available to the public in Los Angeles, covering 63 square miles.
news.summaryZh: Waymo 的自动驾驶机器人出租车服务现已在洛杉矶向公众开放，覆盖63平方英里。
news.content:
Waymo has expanded its robotaxi service to Los Angeles, making it the third city to offer public autonomous rides.

Service Area:
- 63 square miles covering Santa Monica, Century City, and downtown LA
- 24/7 availability
- No safety driver in most conditions

Pricing:
Rides are priced competitively with Uber and Lyft, starting at $3.50 base fare plus $1.50 per mile.

news.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Achieves SOTA on Coding Benchmarks
news.titleZh: Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在编程基准测试中达到 SOTA
news.summary: Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Sonnet sets new records on HumanEval and other coding benchmarks, outperforming GPT-4 and Gemini.
news.summaryZh: Anthropic 的 Claude 3.5 Sonnet 在 HumanEval 等编程基准测试中创造新纪录，超越 GPT-4 和 Gemini。
news.content:
Anthropic has released Claude 3.5 Sonnet, setting new state-of-the-art results on coding evaluation benchmarks.

Benchmark Results:
- HumanEval: 92.0% (previous SOTA: 90.2%)
- MBPP: 88.5%
- SWE-bench: 56.7%

The model is available through Anthropic's API and Claude.ai with existing subscription plans.

news.title: Hugging Face Launches ZeroGPU for Free AI Inference
news.titleZh: Hugging Face 推出 ZeroGPU 免费 AI 推理服务
news.summary: ZeroGPU provides free GPU access for running open-source AI models, democratizing access to AI compute.
news.summaryZh: ZeroGPU 提供免费 GPU 访问来运行开源 AI 模型，让 AI 计算民主化。
news.content:
Hugging Face has launched ZeroGPU, a new service providing free GPU access for AI model inference.

Features:
- Free access to NVIDIA A100 GPUs
- Support for 100,000+ open-source models
- No credit card required
- Rate limits: 1000 requests/day for free tier

This initiative aims to make AI development accessible to researchers and developers worldwide.

news.title: Midjourney V7 Introduces Real-Time Video Generation
news.titleZh: Midjourney V7 引入实时视频生成
news.summary: Midjourney V7 adds video generation capabilities, allowing users to create 4-second clips from images in real-time.
news.summaryZh: Midjourney V7 增加视频生成功能，允许用户实时从图像创建4秒视频片段。
news.content:
Midjourney has released Version 7, adding video generation to their popular AI image creation platform.

Video Features:
- 4-second 1080p video clips
- Image-to-video conversion
- Motion brush for controlling movement
- Camera control (pan, zoom, rotate)

Pricing:
Video generation is included with Pro plans ($60/month) and above. Standard plan users can purchase video credits.

news.title: Meta Releases Llama 3.1 with 405B Parameters
news.titleZh: Meta 发布 Llama 3.1，4050亿参数
news.summary: Meta's largest open-source model yet features 405 billion parameters and rivals GPT-4 in performance.
news.summaryZh: Meta 迄今为止最大的开源模型，拥有4050亿参数，性能媲美 GPT-4。
news.content:
Meta has released Llama 3.1, their most capable open-source language model to date.

Key Specifications:
- 405 billion parameters (largest open-source model)
- 128K context window
- Multilingual support
- Available for commercial use

Performance:
Llama 3.1 matches or exceeds GPT-4 on many benchmarks while being freely available for research and commercial applications.

news.title: NVIDIA Announces Blackwell B200 GPU for AI
news.titleZh: NVIDIA 发布 Blackwell B200 GPU 用于 AI
news.summary: The new Blackwell architecture delivers 4x performance of Hopper, enabling trillion-parameter models.
news.summaryZh: 全新 Blackwell 架构性能是 Hopper 的4倍，支持万亿参数模型。
news.content:
NVIDIA has unveiled the Blackwell B200 GPU, their most powerful AI accelerator yet.

Key Features:
- 208 billion transistors
- 4x performance improvement over H100
- Support for models with up to 10 trillion parameters
- Second-generation transformer engine

Availability:
Blackwell GPUs will begin shipping in late 2026, with major cloud providers already placing orders.

news.title: Cruise Resumes Robotaxi Operations in San Francisco
news.titleZh: Cruise 在旧金山恢复机器人出租车运营
news.summary: After safety review, Cruise's autonomous vehicles return to San Francisco streets with enhanced oversight.
news.summaryZh: 经过安全审查后，Cruise 的自动驾驶车辆重返旧金山街道，并加强监督。
news.content:
Cruise has resumed robotaxi operations in San Francisco following a comprehensive safety review.

New Safety Measures:
- Enhanced remote monitoring
- Improved pedestrian detection
- 24/7 safety operations center
- Regular third-party safety audits

The company aims to rebuild public trust through transparency and rigorous safety protocols.

news.title: Agility Robotics' Digit Enters Warehouse Deployment
news.titleZh: Agility Robotics 的 Digit 进入仓库部署
news.summary: Digit humanoid robots begin commercial deployment in Amazon warehouses for package handling.
news.summaryZh: Digit 人形机器人在亚马逊仓库开始商业部署，用于包裹处理。
news.content:
Agility Robotics has begun deploying their Digit humanoid robots in Amazon fulfillment centers.

Deployment Scope:
- Initial rollout in 5 warehouses
- Tasks include tote recycling and package handling
- Working alongside human employees
- 16-hour continuous operation capability

Amazon plans to expand to 50 facilities by end of 2026 if initial deployment proves successful.

news.title: OpenClaw Introduces Agent Memory System
news.titleZh: OpenClaw 引入智能体记忆系统
news.summary: New persistent memory allows agents to remember conversations and learn from past interactions.
news.summaryZh: 新的持久记忆功能让智能体可以记住对话并从过去的交互中学习。
news.content:
OpenClaw has launched a new Agent Memory System, enabling AI agents to maintain persistent memory across sessions.

Features:
- Long-term memory storage
- Context-aware responses
- Learning from user preferences
- Cross-session continuity

This update significantly enhances agent capabilities for complex, multi-step tasks.

news.title: Runway Gen-3 Alpha: Next-Gen Video Synthesis
news.titleZh: Runway Gen-3 Alpha：下一代视频合成
news.summary: Runway's Gen-3 Alpha generates high-fidelity video with improved temporal consistency and motion.
news.summaryZh: Runway 的 Gen-3 Alpha 生成高保真视频，具有改进的时间一致性和运动效果。
news.content:
Runway has announced Gen-3 Alpha, their most advanced video generation model.

Capabilities:
- 10-second 1080p video generation
- Improved character consistency
- Better motion physics
- Text and image-to-video

The model is available to Runway subscribers starting today.

news.title: xAI Grok-2 Beats GPT-4 on Truthfulness Benchmark
news.titleZh: xAI Grok-2 在真实性基准测试中击败 GPT-4
news.summary: Grok-2 achieves highest score on TruthfulQA, designed to measure model honesty and factuality.
news.summaryZh: Grok-2 在 TruthfulQA 上获得最高分，该测试旨在衡量模型的诚实性和事实性。
news.content:
xAI's Grok-2 has achieved state-of-the-art performance on the TruthfulQA benchmark.

Benchmark Results:
- TruthfulQA: 94.2% (vs GPT-4's 89.1%)
- Significant improvement in avoiding hallucinations
- Better at admitting uncertainty
- Improved fact-checking capabilities

The model is available through xAI's API and X Premium subscription.

news.title: Pony.ai Receives Driverless Taxi License in China
news.titleZh: 小马智行在中国获得无人驾驶出租车牌照
news.summary: First Chinese company to receive permit for fully driverless robotaxi service in Guangzhou.
news.summaryZh: 首家获得广州完全无人驾驶机器人出租车服务许可的中国公司。
news.content:
Pony.ai has become the first Chinese autonomous driving company to receive a driverless taxi license.

Service Details:
- Operations in Guangzhou city center
- No safety driver required
- 24/7 service availability
- Initial fleet of 100 vehicles

This marks a significant milestone for autonomous driving in China.

news.title: DeepMind's RoboCat Learns New Tasks in Hours
news.titleZh: DeepMind 的 RoboCat 在数小时内学习新任务
news.summary: RoboCat can learn new robotic manipulation tasks from as few as 100 demonstrations.
news.summaryZh: RoboCat 可以从仅100次演示中学习新的机器人操作任务。
news.content:
Google DeepMind has unveiled RoboCat, a self-improving robotic agent that learns new tasks rapidly.

Key Capabilities:
- Learns new tasks in hours, not days
- Self-generates additional training data
- Adapts to different robot embodiments
- Continuous self-improvement

RoboCat represents a major step toward general-purpose robotic systems.

news.title: Stability AI Releases Stable Diffusion 3.5
news.titleZh: Stability AI 发布 Stable Diffusion 3.5
news.summary: SD 3.5 delivers improved image quality, better typography, and more accurate anatomy.
news.summaryZh: SD 3.5 提供改进的图像质量、更好的排版和更准确的人体结构。
news.content:
Stability AI has released Stable Diffusion 3.5, featuring significant improvements in image generation quality.

Improvements:
- Better text rendering in images
- Improved human anatomy accuracy
- Enhanced photorealism
- Faster inference speed

The model is available for commercial use through Stability AI's API.

news.title: AI21 Labs' Jamba: Hybrid SSM-Transformer Architecture
news.titleZh: AI21 Labs 的 Jamba：混合 SSM-Transformer 架构
news.summary: Jamba combines Mamba's efficiency with Transformer power, enabling 256K context windows.
news.summaryZh: Jamba 结合 Mamba 的效率和 Transformer 的能力，支持 256K 上下文窗口。
news.content:
AI21 Labs has introduced Jamba, the first production-grade hybrid SSM-Transformer model.

Architecture:
- Combines Mamba SSM and Transformer layers
- 256K token context window
- 3x faster throughput than Transformer-only models
- Reduced memory requirements

Jamba is available through AI21 Labs' API and on Hugging Face.

news.title: Covariant RFM-2: Universal Robot Foundation Model
news.titleZh: Covariant RFM-2：通用机器人基础模型
news.summary: RFM-2 is a universal AI model that can control any robot for any task after minimal training.
news.summaryZh: RFM-2 是一个通用 AI 模型，可以在最少训练后控制任何机器人执行任何任务。
news.content:
Covariant has announced RFM-2, a foundation model for robotics that generalizes across different robot types and tasks.

Capabilities:
- Works with any robotic hardware
- Learns new tasks from few examples
- Understands natural language instructions
- Real-time adaptation

RFM-2 is being deployed in warehouses and manufacturing facilities worldwide.
